mapper.select: SELECT FACE_ID AS faceId, MEMBER_ID AS memberId, FACE_EMBEDDING AS faceEmbedding, MODEL_NAME AS modelName, FACE_ENABLED AS faceEnabled, TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS createdAt, TO_CHAR(UPDATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS updatedAt FROM BL_FACE_CREDENTIALS WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{_parameter} AND FACE_ENABLED = 'Y'

SELECT FACE_ID AS faceId, MEMBER_ID AS memberId, FACE_EMBEDDING AS faceEmbedding, MODEL_NAME AS modelName, FACE_ENABLED AS faceEnabled, TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS createdAt, TO_CHAR(UPDATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS updatedAt FROM BL_FACE_CREDENTIALS WHERE FACE_ENABLED = 'Y' ORDER BY FACE_ID
mapper.update: MERGE INTO BL_FACE_CREDENTIALS f USING (SELECT #{memberId} AS MEMBER_ID FROM DUAL) s ON (f.MEMBER_ID = s.MEMBER_ID) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET FACE_EMBEDDING = #{faceEmbedding}, MODEL_NAME = #{modelName}, FACE_ENABLED = 'Y', UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (FACE_ID, MEMBER_ID, FACE_EMBEDDING, MODEL_NAME, FACE_ENABLED, CREATED_AT) VALUES (SEQ_BL_FACE_CREDENTIALS.NEXTVAL, #{memberId}, #{faceEmbedding}, #{modelName}, 'Y', SYSDATE)
UPDATE BL_FACE_CREDENTIALS SET FACE_ENABLED = 'N', UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{_parameter} AND FACE_ENABLED = 'Y'
